today.condition: Partly sunny with slight chance of rain

sunday.condition: Chance of rain and snow before 11am, then partly sunny

stories.headline: UW Cherry Blossoms Reach Peak Bloom
stories.summary: The University of Washington's iconic cherry blossom trees reached peak bloom on March 20, 2026. The 29 Yoshino cherry trees on the UW Quad are now in full display, marking the arrival of spring in Seattle.

stories.headline: Landslide Blocks Northbound I-5 Near Bellingham
stories.summary: A landslide blocked all northbound lanes of I-5 near Bellingham late Thursday night (March 19), closing the highway just north of North Lake Samish Drive. Approximately 3,000 cubic yards of debris covered the roadway.

stories.headline: Blazing Bagels Abruptly Closes All Locations Amid Bankruptcy
stories.summary: Blazing Bagels has shut down all five Seattle-area locations amid bankruptcy, leaving workers without warning. The popular local bagel chain's sudden closure has left employees surprised and scrambling.

stories.headline: West Seattle Hosts Annual Free Recycle/Reuse/Shred Event
stories.summary: West Seattle's annual free recycle/reuse/shred event is happening today at South Seattle College. The event, presented by the West Seattle Chamber of Commerce and West Seattle Junction Association, runs until noon.

stories.headline: Police Investigate Shooting in West Seattle High Point Area
stories.summary: After multiple 911 callers reported what sounded like gunfire, police found shell casings in a High Point alley between 34th and 35th, north of Morgan. Seattle police detectives are investigating.

stories.headline: Seattle Mariners Opening Day Set for March 26
stories.summary: The Seattle Mariners will open their 2026 season on Thursday, March 26 at T-Mobile Park against the Cleveland Guardians. This marks the 50th season in franchise history and their 27th full season at T-Mobile Park.

stories.headline: Hero Passenger Stops King County Bus After Driver Medical Emergency
stories.summary: A Seattle man jumped into action to stop a King County Metro bus that crashed into multiple vehicles after the driver suffered a medical emergency on Route 5 near Greenwood. The 64-year-old driver was hospitalized.

stories.headline: Chateau Ste. Michelle Announces 2026 Summer Concert Series Lineup
stories.summary: The Chateau Ste. Michelle Summer Concert Series lineup includes Yellowcard, The Fray and more for the 2026 season in Woodinville.
